wave_1.title: Foundation
wave_1.description: Phoenix platform scaffold, authentication system with RBAC + 2FA, seed data pipeline with 109 SVG icons.

wave_2.title: Core
wave_2.description: Therapist directory, Therapy Connect swipe matching, 72+ self-assessment quizzes, Coach AI wellness coaching with crisis detection.

wave_3.title: Dashboards
wave_3.description: Admin portal (15 tabs), Organization portal, Therapist dashboard, User dashboard with PERMA-V analytics, RBAC admin-only live session.

wave_4.title: Tools
wave_4.description: Stripe + PayPal payments, TipTap WYSIWYG editor, real-time messaging with PubSub, Swoosh + SendGrid email system.

wave_5.title: Integration
wave_5.description: Search autocomplete, org invitation system, beta feature flags, Coach AI crisis detection, Azure CI/CD pipeline, staging environment.

wave_6.title: Polish
wave_6.description: Quiz > Match funnel gating (Phase 23), quiz option selection bug fix, CTA typewriter animation, live style guide + AG-UI doc panel.

wave_7.title: Research & Ops
wave_7.description: FB group market research (5,869 posts, 17 groups, 75% PMF), UAT submission system, dev tools panel, OpsDOC 9-wave strategy report with Notion sync.
